description: Style NoteIn earthy tones, coolers comes up with this sharp pair of sandals for a great look this spring. Sandals needn't necessarily tone down your casual ensemble - this pair is the right choice to perfectly offset your summer look. Style this with fitted trousers or cargo shorts for maximum impact.Product DetailsBlack sandal with thick midfoot strap and a plastic toe separatorHighly padded footbed with branding on the heelTPU outsole with patterned grooves and an upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt
